name: Push-Up
description: Classic horizontal press for building chest, triceps, and shoulder strength at home.

name: Wide Push-Up
description: Push-up variation with a wider hand position that emphasizes the chest.

name: Pike Push-Up
description: Bodyweight shoulder press pattern using a hip-hinged inverted position.

name: Chair Dip
description: Triceps-focused dip using a sturdy chair or low platform.

name: Wall Push-Up
description: Very accessible push-up regression done against a wall.

name: Dumbbell Floor Press
description: Chest press done lying on the floor with dumbbells.

description: Vertical pressing exercise for shoulders and triceps using dumbbells.

description: Shoulder isolation exercise that trains the side delts.

description: Shoulder isolation exercise focused on the front delts.

name: Superman Pull

description: Foundational lower-body squat using only bodyweight.

name: Walking Lunge
description: Dynamic lunge variation for legs, balance, and coordination.

description: Loaded lunge variation using dumbbells.

name: Step-Up

name: Calf Raise

name: Wall Sit

name: Jump Squat
description: Explosive bodyweight squat variation for power and conditioning.

name: Plank

name: Side Plank

name: Dead Bug

name: Bird Dog

name: Hollow Body Hold
description: Gymnastics-style core hold for anterior core strength.

description: Floor-based core movement that curls the hips toward the ribs.

name: Bicycle Crunch
description: Rotational crunch variation targeting abs and obliques.

name: Russian Twist

name: Mountain Climber

name: Burpee

name: Jumping Jack
description: Simple full-body cardio movement for warmups or circuits.

name: High Knees
description: Running-in-place drill with high knee drive.

name: Skater Hop
description: Lateral hopping drill for lower-body power and balance.

name: Bear Crawl
description: Crawling movement that trains total-body coordination and core stability.

name: Dumbbell Thruster
description: Squat-to-press movement that combines lower-body and upper-body work.

name: Dumbbell Clean to Press
description: Power movement that brings dumbbells from the floor or hang to overhead.

name: Renegade Row

name: Dumbbell Swing
description: Hip-hinge power movement using one dumbbell.

name: Inchworm

name: World's Greatest Stretch
description: Full-body mobility drill for hips, hamstrings, and upper-back rotation.

name: Scapular Push-Up
description: Shoulder blade control drill performed from a high plank.

name: Hip Airplane
description: Single-leg hip control drill for balance and mobility.

name: Cossack Squat
description: Side-to-side squat variation for leg strength and hip mobility.

name: Chair-Assisted Pistol Squat
description: Single-leg squat progression using a chair for support or target depth.

name: Dumbbell Goblet Squat
description: A front-loaded squat variation that builds legs and trunk control with one dumbbell.

name: Dumbbell Bent-Over Row
description: A home-friendly rowing movement for building back strength with dumbbells.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Press
description: A vertical press for shoulder strength using dumbbells while standing or seated.

name: Dumbbell Reverse Lunge
description: A controlled single-leg movement that trains lower-body strength and balance.

name: Dumbbell Calf Raise
description: A simple loaded calf movement that can be done on flat ground or a step.

name: Dumbbell Curl
description: A basic arm exercise for building biceps strength with dumbbells.

name: Dumbbell Overhead Triceps Extension
description: An overhead triceps movement that only needs one dumbbell.

name: Superman Hold
description: A simple posterior-chain hold for back and glute endurance.

name: Chair Step-Up
description: A single-leg stepping movement using a sturdy chair or low platform.

name: Burpee Without Push-Up
description: A lower-impact burpee variation for home conditioning without the push-up portion.

name: Pull-Up
description: A vertical pulling exercise for back and arm strength using a pull-up bar.

name: Chin-Up
description: A supinated-grip pull-up variation that puts more emphasis on the biceps.

name: Negative Pull-Up
description: Start at the top of a pull-up and lower slowly to build pulling strength.

name: Scapular Pull-Up
description: A small-range pull-up drill focused on shoulder-blade control and pulling mechanics.

name: Dead Hang
description: A passive hanging hold that builds grip endurance and shoulder tolerance.

name: Active Hang
description: A hanging hold with the shoulders pulled down and engaged for better pull-up control.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
description: A hanging core exercise where the knees are lifted toward the chest.

name: Hanging Leg Raise
description: A harder hanging core movement using straighter legs for more leverage.

name: Toes-to-Bar
description: An advanced hanging core movement bringing the toes toward the bar.

name: L-Sit Hang
description: A hanging hold with the legs raised forward to challenge the core and grip.

name: Commando Pull-Up
description: A pull-up variation performed with the body turned sideways to the bar.

name: Towel Grip Hang
description: Hang from towels draped over a pull-up bar to build grip strength.

name: Towel-Assisted Pull-Up
description: A pull-up variation using a towel for grip and unilateral pulling practice.

name: Australian Row
description: A bodyweight row using a low bar, table edge, or sturdy rail.

name: Feet-Elevated Australian Row
description: A harder bodyweight row variation with the feet elevated to increase load.

name: Parallel Bar Dip
description: A bodyweight pushing exercise using dip bars or parallel handles.

name: Bench Dip
description: A chair-supported triceps exercise that works well for home workouts.

name: Straight Bar Dip
description: A dip performed over a straight bar, useful for advanced calisthenics strength.

name: Elevated Pike Push-Up
description: A harder pike push-up variation with the feet elevated to increase shoulder loading.

name: Wall Handstand Hold
description: A wall-supported inverted hold for shoulder strength and body control.

name: Wall Handstand Shoulder Tap
description: A wall handstand drill that adds alternating shoulder taps for stability and control.

name: Pseudo Planche Push-Up
description: A forward-leaning push-up variation that builds planche-style pressing strength.

name: Archer Push-Up
description: A side-to-side push-up variation that loads one arm more heavily at a time.

name: Hindu Push-Up
description: A flowing push-up variation that combines pressing strength with shoulder and spine mobility.

name: Typewriter Push-Up
description: An advanced wide push-up variation where the body shifts side to side near the bottom position.

name: Shrimp Squat
description: A single-leg squat variation that challenges quad strength, balance, and control.

name: Assisted Pistol Squat
description: A single-leg squat using light assistance from a door frame, pole, or sturdy support.

name: Sissy Squat
description: A quad-focused bodyweight squat variation with a backward lean.

name: Assisted Nordic Hamstring Curl
description: A hamstring-strength exercise using an anchor point for the feet and controlled lowering.

name: Reverse Nordic Curl
description: A kneeling quad-strength movement that trains controlled backward leaning.

name: Dragon Flag Progression
description: An advanced core progression using a stable anchor behind the head or shoulders.

name: Tuck Front Lever Hold
description: A calisthenics pulling hold that trains lats, core tension, and straight-arm strength.

name: Skin the Cat
description: A controlled bar rotation drill for shoulder mobility and body control.

name: Hollow Body Rock
description: A dynamic hollow-body core drill used often in calisthenics training.

name: Plank to Push-Up
description: Move between forearm plank and high plank while keeping the hips controlled.
